title: spiesia densa
intro: Spiesia densa, also known as Spilanthes densa, is a tropical plant native to Central and South America, commonly referred to as "toothache plant" due to its analgesic properties. The plant's leaves and flowers possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Spiesia densa include relieving toothache pain, reducing inflammation, and combating oral infections, as well as potential uses in treating digestive issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Spiesia densa can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or combining the plant with other herbs to create teas, tinctures, and salves for topical application.
